The **State of Brazil** ([Portuguese](/wiki/Portuguese_language "Portuguese language"): *Estado do Brasil*) was one of the [states of the Portuguese Empire](/wiki/List_of_states_of_the_Portuguese_Empire "List of states of the Portuguese Empire"), in the [Americas](/wiki/Americas "Americas") during the period of [Colonial Brazil](/wiki/Colonial_Brazil "Colonial Brazil").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=State_of_Brazil&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

In 1621, the [Governorate General of Brazil](/wiki/Governorate_General_of_Brazil "Governorate General of Brazil") was split into two states, the State of Brazil and the [State of Maranhão](/wiki/State_of_Maranh%C3%A3o_(colonial) "State of Maranhão (colonial)"). The state was created on June 13, 1621 by [Philip II of Portugal](/wiki/Philip_III_of_Spain "Philip III of Spain").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

This action divided [Portuguese America](/wiki/Portuguese_America "Portuguese America") into two administrative units, with the capital of the State of Brazil located in [São Salvador](/wiki/Salvador,_Bahia "Salvador, Bahia") and the capital of the State of Maranhão located in [São Luís](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Lu%C3%ADs,_Maranh%C3%A3o "São Luís, Maranhão").

The State of Brazil became a [Viceroyalty](/wiki/Viceroyalty_of_Brazil "Viceroyalty of Brazil") in January 1763, when the capital of the State of Brazil was transferred from São Salvador to Rio de Janeiro.

### Composition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=State_of_Brazil&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Composition")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This section's **factual accuracy is [disputed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Accuracy_dispute "Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute")**. Relevant discussion may be found on the [talk page](/wiki/Talk:State_of_Brazil#Disputed "Talk:State of Brazil"). Please help to ensure that disputed statements are [reliably sourced](/wiki/Wikipedia:Reliable_sources "Wikipedia:Reliable sources"). *(February 2014)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

The State of Brazil originally included 12 of the original 15 captaincies, all except Ceará (which became subordinate to Pernambuco later) and Maranhão, two parts, which included the subcaptaincy of Para west of the [Tordesillas Line](/wiki/Treaty_of_Tordesillas "Treaty of Tordesillas") at that time (north to south):

* [Captaincy of Rio Grande de Norte](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Rio_Grande "Captaincy of Rio Grande")
* [Captaincy of Paraíba](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Para%C3%ADba "Captaincy of Paraíba") (southern Rio Grande & Itamaraca)
* [Captaincy of Pernambuco](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Pernambuco "Captaincy of Pernambuco")
* [Captaincy of Bahia](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Bahia "Captaincy of Bahia")
* [Captaincy of Ilhéus](/w/index.php?title=Captaincy_of_Ilh%C3%A9us&action=edit&redlink=1 "Captaincy of Ilhéus (page does not exist)") (became a *comarca* of Bahia in 1761)
* [Captaincy of Porto Seguro](/w/index.php?title=Captaincy_of_Porto_Seguro&action=edit&redlink=1 "Captaincy of Porto Seguro (page does not exist)")
* [Captaincy of Espírito Santo](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Esp%C3%ADrito_Santo "Captaincy of Espírito Santo")
* [Captaincy of Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Rio_de_Janeiro "Captaincy of Rio de Janeiro") (São Tomé and São Vicente first section)
* [Captaincy of Santo Amaro](/w/index.php?title=Captaincy_of_Santo_Amaro&action=edit&redlink=1 "Captaincy of Santo Amaro (page does not exist)")
* [Captaincy of São Vicente](/wiki/Captaincy_of_S%C3%A3o_Vicente "Captaincy of São Vicente") (second section, later renamed [Captaincy of São Paulo e Minas de Ouro](/w/index.php?title=Captaincy_of_S%C3%A3o_Paulo_e_Minas_de_Ouro&action=edit&redlink=1 "Captaincy of São Paulo e Minas de Ouro (page does not exist)"))
* [Captaincy of Santana](/w/index.php?title=Captaincy_of_Santana&action=edit&redlink=1 "Captaincy of Santana (page does not exist)")

### Captaincies created by the state

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=State_of_Brazil&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Captaincies created by the state")]

* [Captaincy of Alagoas](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Alagoas "Captaincy of Alagoas") 1817 from Pernambuco
* [Captaincy of Ceará](/wiki/Captaincy_of_Cear%C3%A1 "Captaincy of Ceará") 1799 re-split from Pernambuco (previously existed as one of 15 original donatary captaincies)
* [Captaincy of Goiás](/w/index.php?title=Captaincy_of_Goi%C3%A1s&action=edit&redlink=1 "Captaincy of Goiás (page does not exist)")
* [Captaincy of Mato Grosso](/w/index.php?title=Captaincy_of_Mato_Grosso&action=edit&redlink=1 "Captaincy of Mato Grosso (page does not exist)")
